notes: Pho is a food item that grants the Plenty Satisfied buff . This lasts for 10 minutes, but can be canceled at any time by right-clicking the icon ( ) , by selecting the icon using Cycle Next/Previous Buff and then pressing Remove Buff ( ) , or by double-tapping the buff icon ( ) . Pho can be purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 75 SC .

quantityText: Picksaw (when the Jungle Temple is not present; see conditions )

notes: The Piggy Bank is a portable storage item which can be purchased from the Merchant for 1 GC . Like other storage items (eg. chests ), it contains 40 slots (4 rows of 10) that can be used to store anything. The Piggy Bank requires only a space 2 wide and 1 high for placement, but must be placed on a Work Bench , Table , or platforms (in contrast, the Safe , Defender's Forge (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) , and Void Vault (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) can be placed on blocks , but are considerably larger). The Piggy Bank inventory can also be accessed via the Money Trough (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) , which summons a temporary floating version of the Piggy Bank, or the Eye Bone (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) .

conditions: The Monster Meat is a pet-summoning item that spawns a Pig Man that follows the player. When the player is far enough away or in midair, the Pig Man flies while carrying an Umbrella from Don't Starve in order to catch up. The Monster Meat can be dropped from most Corruption or Crimson enemies with a 1/1500 (0.07%) chance. On The Constant seed, the drop rate is increased to a 1/500 (0.2%) chance.

notes: The Pigronata is a placeable furniture item hung by the player from the underside of blocks , similar to banners . When hit with weapons or projectiles , it is destroyed in a shower of confetti, and drops coins and/or other loot. Pigronatas can be purchased from the Party Girl during a Party for 1 GC each.
sourceRefName: Party Girl during a Party for

conditions: The Pink Prickly Pear is a dye material . It grows on top of regular or Hallowed Cacti above surface , but can also be seen on top of Corrupt or Crimson Cacti ( see Notes for details ). [ 1 ] Unlike many plants, instead of being broken by any attack, it has to be harvested with a pickaxe . Its sole purpose is to craft Pink Dye .

notes: The Pin Wheel is a novelty furniture . When placed, the wheel spins if it is windy , with its spin speed depending on the current wind speed in the area. It is purchased from the Merchant for 20 SC during the Windy Day event.

conditions: The Piranha Gun is a Hardmode , post- Plantera ranged weapon that costs no ammunition . It fires a spread of three returning Mechanical Piranha projectiles that inflict the Hemorrhage debuff for 4-6 seconds on hit. The Mechanical Piranha initially moves in a straight path until it collides with an enemy , at which point it latches into the target, follows its movement and deals continuous damage while the ⚒ Use / Attack button is held. If the initial target is killed and the button is still held, the projectiles will home in towards other nearby enemies. The Piranhas return to the gun when the button is released or once no other enemies are in the vicinity, and despawn after one minute of continuous use. Any Piranhas that return to the gun while the ⚒ Use / Attack button is held will be automatically relaunched towards the cursor. Each Piranha can target different enemies, or the same one if there are too few nearby. The Piranha Gun is always found in the Dungeon 's Jungle Chest , which can only be unlocked with a Jungle Key after Plantera has been defeated.

conditions: Planked Wall is a background wall that naturally spawns in Underground Cabins . They can be crafted at a Sawmill with one Stone Block and one Wood .

notes: The Plasma Lamp is a mechanism item that emits a faint blue light and has an animated texture. It is not considered a suitable light source for an NPC house . It is used purely as a decorative light source. The Plasma Lamp can be purchased from the Party Girl for 2 GC .

conditions: Platinum Ore is a pre-Hardmode ore . It spawns in the Underground and Cavern layers , and occasionally on Floating Islands . Platinum Ore also has a small chance to appear as a bonus drop from slimes .

notes: The Pogo Stick is a mount-summoning item that summons a Pogo Stick Mount . Jumping again while in the air causes the player to do a front flip. The Pogo Stick Mount doubles the speed at which the player falls, and reduces fall damage by 60%. It has a max speed of 28 mph , and also has a certain amount of momentum while airborne, meaning it continues traveling in the last horizontal direction the player inputted while in the air, rather than slowing. The Pogo Stick can be purchased from the Party Girl for 25 GC .
The Portable Cement Mixer is a construction accessory that can be purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 10 GC . While equipped, it grants +50% placement speed when placing walls .

conditions: The Step Stool can be found inside surface Chests , Wooden Crates , and Pearlwood Crates . It can also be purchased for 2 GC 50 SC from the Skeleton Merchant during a Waning Crescent .

quantityText: Portal Gun (when no Portal Gun in inventory)

notes: The Portal Gun Station is a Hardmode , post- Moon Lord furniture item and mechanism that can fire portals, similar to the Portal Gun . The Portal Gun Station can be purchased from the Cyborg for 10 GC if the player has a Portal Gun or another Portal Gun Station in their inventory .

The Pretty Mirror is a consumable weapon that can be thrown at targets. The damage it deals is not classified as any of the four damage types and therefore cannot be modified by any buffs or equipment. The Pretty Mirror can be purchased from the Clothier while in a Graveyard for 1 GC . Upon breaking, the Pretty Mirror decreases luck by 0.25 for 7 minutes to all players within a 19.875×19.875-tile rectangular area centered on the point of impact. [ 1 ]
sourceRefName: Clothier while in a Graveyard for

conditions: Princess Fish are a type of Hardmode fish which are found uncommonly by fishing in the Hallow in any layer. They are used to craft Love Potions and Seafood Dinners (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) .

Prismites are a type of Hardmode fish which are found rarely by fishing in the Hallow in any layer. They are used to craft Seafood Dinners (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) and Lifeforce Potions .

notes: The Proximity Mine Launcher is a Hardmode , post- Plantera launcher that can be purchased from the Cyborg for 35 GC . When used, it consumes a rocket and fires a mine that travels in a short arc before becoming stationary and semi-transparent until an enemy approaches or until a minute passes, at which point it explodes. The player will not activate the mine, but will be damaged by an exploding mine. Stationary mines deal 300% of the weapon's damage (240 base damage) [ 1 ] to enemies, but not to players, who only take 100% damage instead.

conditions: The Pufferfish is a rare Critter that spawns in the Ocean . Upon getting hit or leaving water , it will puff up. [ 1 ] The Pufferfish will float to the surface of water when puffed up.

notes: The Pulse Bow is a Hardmode bow that can be purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 45 GC after defeating all three mechanical bosses . When used, it converts any type of arrow into a high-velocity blue bolt. The bolt is unaffected by gravity, can either pierce enemies or bounce off blocks up to five times, and travels for 3.5 seconds (about 480 tiles) before dissipating. The Pulse Bow also has a base 11% critical strike chance as opposed to the usual 4%.

conditions: Pumpkin plants can be planted manually on pure and Hallowed grass (including the mowed versions) with Pumpkin Seeds , which are sold by the Dryad . They also grow naturally on the Surface during the Halloween seasonal event. Pumpkin plants can be harvested using almost any weapon or tool, which causes Pumpkin items to drop.

notes: Pumpkin Seeds are purchased from the Dryad for 2 SC 50 CC each.

conditions: The Pupfish is a critter that spawns infrequently in bodies of water in the Desert biome that are directly above Sand Blocks . Unlike many critters, Pupfish are capable of spawning on-screen. The Pupfish has only 5 health and no defense , and can be damaged by other enemies and players.

notes: The Pygmy Necklace is a pre-Hardmode accessory that provides the player with one additional minion slot . It is purchased from the Witch Doctor for 20 GC at night .
